title: Heartopia
notes:
◆ Feature Updates and Optimizations ◆
[Hide & Seek Party]
A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

title: Pixel Flow!
developer: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
notes: Fresh update vibes are here! New adventures, better performance, and smoother gameplay all rolled into one. We kicked bugs to the curb and cranked up the fun. Dive in and see what’s new!

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games
notes:
Thank you for being part of our amazing community! We are dedicated to bringing you the #1 gaming experience, and this update is no exception.

Update now to enjoy: 
• Fresh in-game events and rewards
• A smoother, bug-free experience
• Exciting new improvements and surprises

Ready to play? Let’s go! Don't forget to leave us a review—we love hearing from you!
